title: Ghost vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Postmark?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
